	{"bbox_2d": [209, 288, 269, 299], "text_content": "Warning:"},
	{"bbox_2d": [209, 305, 886, 317], "text_content": "ADDR0 and ADDR1 pins must be connected to ground when there is no connection to an MCU"},
	{"bbox_2d": [209, 320, 719, 332], "text_content": "SCL and SDA are pulled down when none of VDD or VSYS is present"},
	{"bbox_2d": [71, 350, 111, 361], "text_content": "2.2.5"},
	{"bbox_2d": [159, 350, 216, 361], "text_content": "DISCH"},
	{"bbox_2d": [159, 368, 917, 380], "text_content": "This input/output pin can be used to implement a discharge path for highly capacitive VBUS line on power system"},
	{"bbox_2d": [159, 382, 200, 393], "text_content": "side."},
	{"bbox_2d": [159, 400, 923, 412], "text_content": "When used as input, the discharge is internal and a serial resistor must connected to the pin to limit the discharge"},
	{"bbox_2d": [159, 414, 541, 426], "text_content": "current through the pin. Maximum discharge current is 500 mA."},
	{"bbox_2d": [159, 432, 871, 444], "text_content": "The pin can be also used as an open drain output to control an external VBUS discharge path when higher"},
	{"bbox_2d": [159, 446, 461, 458], "text_content": "discharge current is required by the application, for instance."},
	{"bbox_2d": [159, 464, 893, 476], "text_content": "The pin is activated at the same time as the internal discharge path on VBUS_VS_DISCH pin. The discharge"},
	{"bbox_2d": [159, 478, 889, 490], "text_content": "is activated automatically during cable disconnection, transition to a lower PDO voltage, hard reset and error"},
	{"bbox_2d": [159, 492, 835, 504], "text_content": "recovery state. The discharge time is programmable by NVM (see Section 5 Start-up configuration)."},
	{"bbox_2d": [71, 510, 111, 521], "text_content": "2.2.6"},
	{"bbox_2d": [159, 510, 202, 521], "text_content": "GND"},
	{"bbox_2d": [159, 528, 200, 539], "text_content": "Ground."},

	{"bbox_2d": [159, 562, 231, 573], "text_content": "ATTACH"},
	{"bbox_2d": [159, 579, 912, 591], "text_content": "This pin is asserted when a valid source-to-sink connection is established. It is also asserted when a connection"},
